# Syft-only package managers

<!-- The reference table below this banner is regenerated by `make generate`. Hand-written prose below the table lives in internal/support/prose/. -->

These package managers have no native Bomly detector. Bomly delegates them to [Syft](https://github.com/anchore/syft), which produces a flat package list (no transitive edges, no scope classification).

They're grouped here as a single navigation bucket because their behavior is uniform: read the manifest, emit a package list, hand off to the matchers. The real ecosystem each package manager belongs to is shown in the table below.

| Package manager | Real ecosystem | Evidence patterns |
| --- | --- | --- |
| [`alpm`](alpm.md) | `alpm` | `var/lib/pacman/local/*/desc` |
| [`apk`](apk.md) | `apk` | `lib/apk/db/installed` |
| [`cabal`](cabal.md) | `haskell` | `cabal.project.freeze` |
| [`conda`](conda.md) | `conda` | `conda-meta/*.json` |
| [`dpkg`](dpkg.md) | `dpkg` | `lib/dpkg/status`, `lib/dpkg/status.d/*`, `lib/opkg/info/*.control`, `lib/opkg/status` |
| [`gemspec`](gemspec.md) | `ruby` | `*.gemspec` |
| [`homebrew`](homebrew.md) | `homebrew` | `Cellar/*/*/.brew/*.rb`, `Library/Taps/*/*/Formula/*.rb` |
| [`luarocks`](luarocks.md) | `lua` | `*.rockspec` |
| [`nix`](nix.md) | `nix` | `nix/var/nix/db/db.sqlite`, `nix/store/*.drv` |
| [`opam`](opam.md) | `ocaml` | `*opam` |
| [`otp`](otp.md) | `erlang` | `*.app` |
| [`pdm`](pdm.md) | `python` | `pdm.lock`, `pyproject.toml` |
| [`pear`](pear.md) | `php` | `php/.registry/**/*.reg` |
| [`portage`](portage.md) | `portage` | `var/db/pkg/*/*/CONTENTS` |
| [`r-package`](r-package.md) | `r` | `DESCRIPTION` |
| [`rebar`](rebar.md) | `erlang` | `rebar.lock` |
| [`rpm`](rpm.md) | `rpm` | `var/lib/rpmmanifest/container-manifest-2`, `var/lib/rpm/Packages`, `var/lib/rpm/Packages.db`, `var/lib/rpm/rpmdb.sqlite`, `usr/share/rpm/Packages`, `usr/share/rpm/Packages.db`, `usr/share/rpm/rpmdb.sqlite`, `usr/lib/sysimage/rpm/Packages`, `usr/lib/sysimage/rpm/Packages.db`, `usr/lib/sysimage/rpm/rpmdb.sqlite` |
| [`setuppy`](setuppy.md) | `python` | `setup.py` |
| [`snap`](snap.md) | `snap` | `snap/snapcraft.yaml`, `snap/manifest.yaml`, `doc/linux-modules-*/changelog.Debian.gz`, `usr/share/snappy/dpkg.yaml` |
| [`stack`](stack.md) | `haskell` | `stack.yaml`, `stack.yaml.lock` |
| [`swipl-pack`](swipl-pack.md) | `prolog` | `pack.pl` |
| [`terraform`](terraform.md) | `terraform` | `.terraform.lock.hcl` |
| [`wordpress`](wordpress.md) | `wordpress` | `wp-content/plugins/*/*.php` |

## How to read this

- Detector chain on every page below is `syft-detector` — that's what defines membership here.
- `--install-first` is not supported. Run the package manager's install command yourself before scanning if you want Syft to see a fully materialized environment.
- For container images, Syft is often the right tool regardless of native Bomly support; see [docs/SCAN_TARGETS.md](../../SCAN_TARGETS.md).
